description.value:
A weighted dart attached to a long rope, allowing the wielder to strike enemies at range and then retrieve the weapon. Its flexible nature enables a variety of combat techniques.

Basic: Two-Handed, Ranged d4 (20/50), Brace, Conceal, Entangle, Hipshot, Puncture

rmeData.masterPerk: You can Brace as a bonus action and make a number of Brace attacks without using your reaction equal to your proficiency bonus before the start of your next turn.
